core.title: Core
core.description: Platform-agnostic contact form logic: CORS evaluation, input validation, honeypot handling, and email orchestration. Published on npm and paired with a provider and a platform adapter.

resend.title: Resend
resend.description: Resend email provider implementing the Core EmailProvider interface.

nodemailer.title: Nodemailer
nodemailer.description: Nodemailer (SMTP) email provider implementing the Core EmailProvider interface.

vercel.title: Vercel
vercel.description: Deployable Vercel adapter exposing a single POST /api/contact endpoint with multi-provider support, CORS controls, WAF rate limiting, and honeypot spam protection.

demo.title: Demo
demo.description: A demo site for Contact API with live contact form examples for both Resend and Nodemailer configurations.
